comparators.definition: Byte equality of complete source records
Canonical normalized-claim equality after removing source-local identifiers
Equality of determinate affected-release sets; any missing judgment abstains
Project-local version-expression relational signature over normalized ranges and explicit versions
Concrete affectedness equality after executing version semantics over the digest-bound public release universe
Canonical concrete repair-action relation; UNKNOWN cannot establish equivalence or divergence

denominator_policy: All qualified edges remain in the denominator; abstentions and non-executable units are explicit.
negative_controls: claim-label permutation within package is forbidden because it destroys provenance
redistributable synthetic fixtures test known-equivalent and divergent action controls without entering prevalence denominators
UNKNOWN-versus-concrete pairs cannot be counted as witnesses
release-order permutation must leave certificates invariant after canonicalization
